description: CompositionGreen shirt made of a blended cotton fabric, has short sleeves fold over cuffs,  spread collar, full buttoned placket, patch pockets on the chest with a pleat, yoke at the back, branding embroidered above the left pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron: do not iron on decorationsThe patch pockets on the chest and embroidered brand lettering adds rugged styling to this shirt from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
